name: Fantasy World RPG - Myrren
description:
This is an RPG where you can start out as anything! (Literally)

It can be an Isekai or you can already be a part of the world. Start as a summoned adventurer to defeat the Demon Lord (not yet, I'm tired and lazy), a famed knight belonging to one of three kingdoms, a merchant, humble farmer or even a slave. Not really a limit, could be a little gecko if you want (they're adorable) or a mighty dragon.

I've seen and used a few RPG bots like this and decided to make one of my own that mixes a few elements of others bots. I haven't tested with the Janitor LLM, so I'm not sure how it will behave, but it does work with Proxy. If you don't have a proxy, there'll be a Reddit tutorial at the end of the description.

There is nothing I can do if the bot speaks for you but I can offer some solutions:

1) Keep your messages substantial by including actions (even small ones), thoughts, observations and obviously talking.

2) Speak in the third person. Don't use 'I' or 'Me', but use your persona name and 'he'/'she'. It helps the AI tell between characters.

3) Either reroll or edit messages.

Inspiration: https://janitorai.com/characters/d313c593-8ba3-4df5-9869-545f066ad1b3_character-isekai-rpg

Inspiration: https://janitorai.com/characters/11a1025a-dbc4-4d65-8fa6-32d5df7555c4_character-medieval-fantasy-world-rp

If you want information on the bot/world, just open the Scenario. I know it probably isn't very good but it's my first time trying this kind of thing, but I'll try updating it when issues come up. If you have a suggestion for something I should add, leave a review with your suggestion. I've already added a few creatures from other media and there are plenty of references (I hope they're good), so I'd probably add anything if asked.

With the tutorial I would suggest opening Reddit first, then opening Anonymous Browsing in a private tab (so you don't have to sign in). Proxy Tutorial (Reddit): https://www.reddit.com/r/JanitorAI_Official/s/HolR7bFd3W
creator: Lorynthen
